cta.title: Get a Commercial Solar Quote
cta.subtitle: Our team will assess your business premises and design a system that delivers maximum savings and ROI.

hero.title: Commercial Solar Solutions
hero.subtitle: Reduce operating costs and meet your sustainability targets with a commercial solar PV system designed for your business.

about.title: Cut Energy Costs & Boost Sustainability
paragraphs: Commercial energy costs are one of the biggest overheads for Irish businesses. A solar PV system can reduce your electricity bills by up to 50%, with typical payback periods of 3-5 years.

We work with businesses of all sizes — from small offices and retail units to large industrial facilities. Our team designs bespoke systems that maximise your roof space and energy generation across Ireland.

With the Accelerated Capital Allowance (ACA) scheme allowing businesses to write off the full cost of qualifying energy-efficient equipment in the first year, and generous feed-in tariffs for surplus energy exported to the grid, the financial case for commercial solar has never been stronger.

trusted.title: Trusted by Local Businesses
trusted.subtitle: We have completed installations for businesses across Ireland
